reason: Verify all provider implementations retain the streaming and cancellation contract.
Verify migration preservation, FTS transactionality, paging, and cleanup safety.
Verify every failure becomes a stable safe code without internal detail leakage.
Verify paths, query text, message content, credentials, and attachment bytes never reach logs.
Verify strict Rust formatting, lint, tests, and migration coverage.
Verify accessible attachment controls and coherent inbox/search/reader behavior.
Verify stale search requests, operation status, pagination, and selection state are correct.
Verify generated bindings and runtime decoders reject malformed payloads.
Verify frontend lint, type-check, tests, and user-visible state coverage.
Trace attachment and search data across UI, IPC, application, repository, and provider layers.
Check for duplicated provider/download/search/paging logic and inconsistent DTO mapping.
